   133→    classNode: 0,
   134→    entity: 0,
   135→    subgraphOuter: 0,
   136→    subgraphHeader: 0,
   137→    actor: 0,
   138→    activation: 0,
   139→  },
   140→  soft: {
   141→    node: 5,
   142→    classNode: 4,
   143→    entity: 5,
   144→    subgraphOuter: 7,
   145→    subgraphHeader: 6,
   146→    actor: 6,
   147→    activation: 4,
   148→  },
   149→  rounded: {
   150→    node: 10,
   151→    classNode: 8,
   152→    entity: 10,
   153→    subgraphOuter: 14,
   154→    subgraphHeader: 11,
   155→    actor: 10,
   156→    activation: 8,
   157→  },
   158→  pill: {
   159→    node: -1,
   160→    classNode: 16,
   161→    entity: 14,
   162→    subgraphOuter: 22,
   163→    subgraphHeader: 16,
   164→    actor: -1,
   165→    activation: 10,
   166→  },
   167→} as const;
   168→
   169→const EDGE_LABEL_FONT_SIZE = 11;
   170→
   171→function mixFrom(base: ThemeChannels, percent: number): string {
   172→  return `color-mix(in srgb, ${base.fg} ${percent}%, ${base.bg})`;
   173→}
   174→
   175→function normalizeThemeChannels(base: ThemeChannels): ThemeChannels {
   176→  return {
   177→    ...base,
   178→    line: base.line ?? mixFrom(base, 50),
   179→    accent: base.accent ?? mixFrom(base, 85),
   180→    muted: base.muted ?? mixFrom(base, 40),
   181→    surface: base.surface ?? mixFrom(base, 3),
   182→    border: base.border ?? mixFrom(base, 20),
   183→  };
   184→}
   185→
   186→function forceDirection(
   187→  source: string,
   188→  directionOverride: BeautifulRenderConfig["directionOverride"],
   189→): string {
   190→  if (directionOverride === "default") {
   191→    return source;
   192→  }
   193→
   194→  const lines = source.split("\n");
   195→  const firstMeaningfulIndex = lines.findIndex((line) => {
   196→    const trimmed = line.trim();
   197→    return trimmed.length > 0 && !trimmed.startsWith("%%");
   198→  });
   199→
   200→  if (firstMeaningfulIndex < 0) {
   201→    return source;
   202→  }
   203→
   204→  const header = lines[firstMeaningfulIndex] ?? "";
   205→  const flowHeader = header.match(/^\s*(graph|flowchart)\s+(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\b/i);
   206→  if (flowHeader) {
   207→    lines[firstMeaningfulIndex] = header.replace(/\b(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\b/i, directionOverride);
   208→    return lines.join("\n");
   209→  }
   210→
   211→  const stateHeader = header.match(/^\s*stateDiagram(?:-v2)?\s*$/i);
   212→  if (stateHeader) {
   213→    const directionLineRegex = /^\s*direction\s+(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\s*$/i;
   214→    for (let index = firstMeaningfulIndex + 1; index < lines.length; index += 1) {
   215→      const line = lines[index];
   216→      if (!line) {
   217→        continue;
   218→      }
   219→
   220→      if (directionLineRegex.test(line.trim())) {
   221→        lines[index] = `  direction ${directionOverride}`;
   222→        return lines.join("\n");
   223→      }
   224→    }
   225→
   226→    lines.splice(firstMeaningfulIndex + 1, 0, `  direction ${directionOverride}`);
   227→    return lines.join("\n");
   228→  }
   229→
   230→  return source;
   231→}
   232→
   233→function toThemeTokenValues(theme: ThemeChannels): ThemeTokenValues {
   234→  return {
   235→    bg: theme.bg,
   236→    fg: theme.fg,
   237→    line: theme.line ?? mixFrom(theme, 50),
   238→    accent: theme.accent ?? mixFrom(theme, 85),
   239→    muted: theme.muted ?? mixFrom(theme, 40),
   240→    surface: theme.surface ?? mixFrom(theme, 3),
   241→    border: theme.border ?? mixFrom(theme, 20),
   242→  };
   243→}
   244→
   245→function resolveThemeTokenValues(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): ThemeTokenValues {
   246→  const baseTheme = resolveDiagramThemeTokens(config.diagramTheme);
   247→  const normalizedBaseTheme = normalizeThemeChannels({
   248→    ...baseTheme,
   249→    bg: config.useCustomBg ? config.customBg : baseTheme.bg,
   250→    fg: config.useCustomFg ? config.customFg : baseTheme.fg,
   251→  });
   252→
   253→  const resolved = toThemeTokenValues(normalizedBaseTheme);
   254→  return {
   255→    ...resolved,
   256→    line: config.useCustomLine ? config.customLine : resolved.line,
   257→    accent: config.useCustomAccent ? config.customAccent : resolved.accent,
   258→    muted: config.useCustomMuted ? config.customMuted : resolved.muted,
   259→    surface: config.useCustomSurface ? config.customSurface : resolved.surface,
   260→    border: config.useCustomBorder ? config.customBorder : resolved.border,
   261→  };
   262→}
   263→
   264→function resolveElementCustomColor(
   265→  role: ElementColorRole,
   266→  rule: ElementColorRule,
   267→  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
   268→): string {
   269→  if (rule.source === "none") {
   270→    return "transparent";
   271→  }
   272→
   273→  if (rule.source === "custom") {
   274→    return rule.custom;
   275→  }
   276→
   277→  if (rule.source === "token") {
   278→    return tokens[rule.token];
   279→  }
   280→
   281→  if (role === "text") {
   282→    return tokens.fg;
   283→  }
   284→
   285→  if (role === "arrowHeads") {
   286→    return tokens.accent;
   287→  }
   288→
   289→  if (role === "secondaryText") {
   290→    return mixFrom(tokens, 60);
   291→  }
   292→
   293→  if (role === "edgeLabels") {
   294→    return mixFrom(tokens, 40);
   295→  }
   296→
   297→  if (role === "faintText") {
   298→    return mixFrom(tokens, 25);
   299→  }
   300→
   301→  if (role === "connectors") {
   302→    return mixFrom(tokens, 50);
   303→  }
   304→
   305→  if (role === "nodeFill") {
   306→    return mixFrom(tokens, 3);
   307→  }
   308→
   309→  if (role === "groupHeader") {
   310→    return mixFrom(tokens, 5);
   311→  }
   312→
   313→  if (role === "innerStrokes") {
   314→    return mixFrom(tokens, 12);
   315→  }
   316→
   317→  if (role === "nodeStroke") {
   318→    return mixFrom(tokens, 20);
   319→  }
   320→
   321→  return tokens.fg;
   322→}
   323→
   324→function isMermaidOptionTokenValue(token: ThemeToken): token is keyof MermaidOptionTokenValues {
   325→  return (
   326→    token === "line" ||
   327→    token === "accent" ||
   328→    token === "muted" ||
   329→    token === "surface" ||
   330→    token === "border"
   331→  );
   332→}
   333→
   334→function resolveMermaidOptionTokenOverrides(
   335→  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
   336→  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
   337→): MermaidOptionTokenValues {
   338→  const overrides: MermaidOptionTokenValues = {};
   339→
   340→  if (config.useCustomLine) {
   341→    overrides.line = config.customLine;
   342→  }
   343→  if (config.useCustomAccent) {
   344→    overrides.accent = config.customAccent;
   345→  }
   346→  if (config.useCustomMuted) {
   347→    overrides.muted = config.customMuted;
   348→  }
   349→  if (config.useCustomSurface) {
   350→    overrides.surface = config.customSurface;
   351→  }
   352→  if (config.useCustomBorder) {
   353→    overrides.border = config.customBorder;
   354→  }
   355→
   356→  for (const roleMeta of ELEMENT_COLOR_ROLES) {
   357→    const bridge = roleMeta.tokenBridge;
   358→    if (!bridge || roleMeta.scope === "text" || !isMermaidOptionTokenValue(bridge)) {
   359→      continue;
   360→    }
   361→
   362→    const rule = config.elementColors[roleMeta.role];
   363→    if (rule.source === "default") {
   364→      continue;
   365→    }
   366→
   367→    overrides[bridge] = resolveElementCustomColor(roleMeta.role, rule, tokens);
   368→  }
   369→
   370→  return overrides;
   371→}
   372→
   373→function applyOptionTokenOverrides(
   374→  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
   375→  overrides: MermaidOptionTokenValues,
   376→): ThemeTokenValues {
   377→  return {
   378→    ...tokens,
   379→    line: overrides.line ?? tokens.line,
   380→    accent: overrides.accent ?? tokens.accent,
   381→    muted: overrides.muted ?? tokens.muted,
   382→    surface: overrides.surface ?? tokens.surface,
   383→    border: overrides.border ?? tokens.border,
   384→  };
   385→}
   386→
   387→function buildAsciiThemeFromTokens(tokens: ThemeTokenValues): AsciiThemeValues {
   388→  return {
   389→    fg: tokens.fg,
   390→    border: tokens.border,
   391→    line: tokens.line,
   392→    arrow: tokens.accent,
   393→    accent: tokens.accent,
   394→    bg: tokens.bg,
   395→    corner: tokens.line,
   396→    junction: tokens.border,
   397→  };
   398→}
   399→
   400→function resolveElementScopedOverrides(
   401→  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
   402→  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
   403→): {
   404→  svgDeclarations: string[];
   405→  textOverrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues>;
   406→} {
   407→  const svgDeclarations: string[] = [];
   408→  const textOverrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues> = {};
   409→
   410→  for (const roleMeta of ELEMENT_COLOR_ROLES) {
   411→    const rule = config.elementColors[roleMeta.role];
   412→    if (rule.source === "default") {
   413→      continue;
   414→    }
   415→
   416→    const color = resolveElementCustomColor(roleMeta.role, rule, tokens);
   417→    if (roleMeta.scope !== "text") {
   418→      const cssVar = ELEMENT_ROLE_CSS_VAR[roleMeta.role];
   419→      if (cssVar) {
   420→        svgDeclarations.push(`${cssVar}: ${color};`);
   421→      }
   422→    }
   423→
   424→    if (roleMeta.scope !== "svg") {
   425→      const field = ELEMENT_ROLE_TEXT_THEME_FIELD[roleMeta.role];
   426→      if (field) {
   427→        textOverrides[field] = color;
   428→      }
   429→    }
   430→  }
   431→
   432→  return {
   433→    svgDeclarations,
   434→    textOverrides,
   435→  };
   436→}
   437→
   438→function applyTextThemeOverrides(
   439→  baseTheme: AsciiThemeValues,
   440→  overrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues>,
   441→): AsciiThemeValues {
   442→  const nextTheme: AsciiThemeValues = {
   443→    ...baseTheme,
   444→    ...overrides,
   445→  };
   446→
   447→  nextTheme.accent = nextTheme.arrow;
   448→  nextTheme.corner = nextTheme.line;
   449→  nextTheme.junction = nextTheme.border;
   450→
   451→  return nextTheme;
   452→}
   453→
   454→function buildAsciiRenderOptions(
   455→  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
   456→  theme: AsciiThemeValues,
   457→  previewMode: boolean,
   458→): AsciiRenderOptions {
   459→  return {
   460→    useAscii: config.outputMode === "ascii",
   461→    colorMode: previewMode ? "html" : config.textColorMode,
   462→    paddingX: config.textPaddingX,
   463→    paddingY: config.textPaddingY,
   464→    boxBorderPadding: config.textBoxBorderPadding,
   465→    theme,
   466→  };
   467→}
   468→
   469→function stripCommonLeadingIndent(source: string): string {
   470→  const lines = source.split("\n");
   471→  let minIndent = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
   472→
   473→  for (const line of lines) {
   474→    if (line.trim().length === 0) {
   475→      continue;
   476→    }
   477→
   478→    const indent = line.match(/^ */u)?.[0].length ?? 0;
   479→    minIndent = Math.min(minIndent, indent);
   480→  }
   481→
   482→  if (!Number.isFinite(minIndent) || minIndent <= 0) {
   483→    return source;
   484→  }
   485→
   486→  return lines.map((line) => line.slice(minIndent)).join("\n");
   487→}
   488→
   489→function resolveBaseFont(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): string {
   490→  if (config.baseFont !== "Custom") {
   491→    return config.baseFont;
   492→  }
   493→
   494→  const customFamily = config.customBaseFontFamily.trim();
   495→  return customFamily.length > 0 ? customFamily : "Inter";
   496→}
   497→
   498→function resolveMonoFont(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): string {
   499→  if (config.monoFont !== "Custom") {
   500→    return config.monoFont;
   501→  }
   502→
   503→  const customFamily = config.customMonoFontFamily.trim();
   504→  return customFamily.length > 0 ? customFamily : "JetBrains Mono";
   505→}
   506→
   507→function toCssSingleQuotedFont(fontFamily: string): string {
   508→  return `'${fontFamily.replace(/\\/gu, "\\\\").replace(/'/gu, "\\'")}'`;
   509→}
   510→
   511→export function buildBeautifulMermaidOptions(
   512→  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
   513→  tokens?: ThemeTokenValues,
   514→): RenderOptions {
   515→  const effectiveTokens = (() => {
   516→    if (tokens) {
   517→      return tokens;
   518→    }
   519→
   520→    const resolvedTokens = resolveThemeTokenValues(config);
   521→    const tokenOverrides = resolveMermaidOptionTokenOverrides(config, resolvedTokens);
   522→    return applyOptionTokenOverrides(resolvedTokens, tokenOverrides);
   523→  })();
   524→
   525→  return {
   526→    bg: effectiveTokens.bg,
   527→    fg: effectiveTokens.fg,
   528→    line: effectiveTokens.line,
   529→    accent: effectiveTokens.accent,
   530→    muted: effectiveTokens.muted,
   531→    surface: effectiveTokens.surface,
   532→    border: effectiveTokens.border,
   533→    font: resolveBaseFont(config),
   534→    transparent: config.transparent,
   535→    padding: config.padding,
   536→    nodeSpacing: config.nodeSpacing,
   537→    layerSpacing: config.layerSpacing,
   538→    componentSpacing: config.componentSpacing,
   539→  };
   540→}
   541→
   542→function isRetryableLayoutError(error: unknown): boolean {
   543→  const message = getErrorMessage(error);
   544→  return /scanline constraint|invalid hitboxes/i.test(message);
   545→}
   546→
   547→function buildSafeLayoutOptions(base: RenderOptions): RenderOptions {
   548→  return {
   549→    ...base,
   550→    padding: Math.max(base.padding ?? 0, 36),
   551→    nodeSpacing: Math.max(base.nodeSpacing ?? 0, 24),
   552→    layerSpacing: Math.max(base.layerSpacing ?? 0, 48),
   553→    componentSpacing: Math.max(base.componentSpacing ?? 0, 32),
   554→  };
   555→}
   556→
   557→function renderSvgWithFallback(
   558→  runtime: BeautifulMermaidRuntime,
   559→  source: string,
   560→  originalSource: string,
   561→  renderOptions: RenderOptions,
   562→): SvgRenderResult {
   563→  try {
   564→    return {
   565→      svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(source, renderOptions),
   566→      usedFallback: false,
   567→    };
   568→  } catch (error: unknown) {
   569→    if (!isRetryableLayoutError(error)) {
   570→      throw error;
   571→    }
   572→  }
   573→
   574→  const safeOptions = buildSafeLayoutOptions(renderOptions);
   575→
   576→  try {
   577→    return {
   578→      svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(source, safeOptions),
   579→      usedFallback: true,
   580→    };
   581→  } catch (error: unknown) {
   582→    if (!isRetryableLayoutError(error) || source === originalSource) {
   583→      throw error;
   584→    }
   585→  }
   586→
   587→  return {
   588→    svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(originalSource, safeOptions),
   589→    usedFallback: true,
   590→  };
   591→}
   592→
   593→function subgraphPresetRules(preset: BeautifulRenderConfig["subgraphStyle"]): string {
   594→  if (preset === "default") {
   595→    return "";
   596→  }
   597→
   598→  if (preset === "minimal") {
   599→    return `
   600→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   601→    fill: transparent;
   602→    stroke-width: 1 !important;
   603→  }
   604→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   605→    fill: transparent;
   606→    stroke-width: 0 !important;
   607→  }
   608→  .subgraph > text {
   609→    font-weight: 560;
   610→  }`;
   611→  }
   612→
   613→  if (preset === "soft") {
   614→    return `
   615→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   616→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 2.5%, var(--bg));
   617→    fill-opacity: 0.96;
   618→  }
   619→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   620→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 9%, var(--bg));
   621→  }
   622→  .subgraph > text {
   623→    font-weight: 600;
   624→  }`;
   625→  }
   626→
   627→  if (preset === "outlined") {
   628→    return `
   629→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   630→    fill: transparent;
   631→    stroke-dasharray: 6 3 !important;
   632→    stroke-width: 1.05 !important;
   633→  }
   634→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   635→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 6%, var(--bg));
   636→  }
   637→  .subgraph > text {
   638→    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
   639→    font-weight: 580;
   640→  }`;
   641→  }
   642→
   643→  if (preset === "elevated") {
   644→    return `
   645→  .subgraph {
   646→    filter: drop-shadow(0 7px 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 12%, transparent));
   647→  }
   648→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   649→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 4%, var(--bg));
   650→    fill-opacity: 0.98;
   651→  }
   652→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   653→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 12%, var(--bg));
   654→  }
   655→  .subgraph > text {
   656→    font-weight: 620;
   657→  }`;
   658→  }
   659→
   660→  if (preset === "accent") {
   661→    return `
   662→  .subgraph {
   663→    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 40%, transparent));
   664→  }
   665→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   666→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 14%, var(--bg)) !important;
   667→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 72%, var(--bg)) !important;
   668→    stroke-width: 1.25 !important;
   669→  }
   670→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   671→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 22%, var(--bg)) !important;
   672→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 82%, var(--bg)) !important;
   673→    stroke-width: 1.25 !important;
   674→  }
   675→  .subgraph > text {
   676→    fill: var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) !important;
   677→    font-weight: 650;
   678→  }`;
   679→  }
   680→
   681→  if (preset === "brutalist") {
   682→    return `
   683→  .subgraph {
   684→    filter: drop-shadow(4px 4px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 76%, var(--bg)));
   685→  }
   686→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   687→    fill: var(--bg);
   688→    stroke: var(--fg) !important;
   689→    stroke-width: 2.2 !important;
   690→  }
   691→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   692→    fill: var(--fg);
   693→    stroke: var(--fg) !important;
   694→    stroke-width: 2.2 !important;
   695→  }
   696→  .subgraph > text {
   697→    fill: var(--bg) !important;
   698→    font-weight: 700;
   699→    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
   700→  }`;
   701→  }
   702→
   703→  if (preset === "neon") {
   704→    return `
   705→  .subgraph {
   706→    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 55%, transparent));
   707→  }
   708→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   709→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 8%, var(--bg));
   710→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 95%, var(--bg)) !important;
   711→    stroke-width: 1.4 !important;
   712→  }
   713→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   714→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 22%, var(--bg));
   715→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 98%, var(--bg)) !important;
   716→    stroke-width: 1.4 !important;
   717→  }
   718→  .subgraph > text {
   719→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 96%, var(--bg)) !important;
   720→    font-weight: 660;
   721→    letter-spacing: 0.012em;
   722→  }`;
   723→  }
   724→
   725→  if (preset === "signal") {
   726→    return `
   727→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   728→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--line, var(--_line)) 8%, var(--bg));
   729→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--line, var(--_line)) 78%, var(--bg)) !important;
   730→    stroke-width: 1.3 !important;
   731→  }
   732→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   733→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 34%, var(--bg));
   734→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 90%, var(--bg)) !important;
   735→    stroke-width: 1.3 !important;
   736→  }
   737→  .subgraph > text {
   738→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 96%, var(--bg)) !important;
   739→    font-weight: 640;
   740→  }`;
   741→  }
   742→
   743→  if (preset === "contrast") {
   744→    return `
   745→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   746→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 10%, var(--bg));
   747→    stroke-width: 1.35 !important;
   748→  }
   749→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   750→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 82%, var(--bg));
   751→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 88%, var(--bg)) !important;
   752→    stroke-width: 1.35 !important;
   753→  }
   754→  .subgraph > text {
   755→    fill: var(--bg) !important;
   756→    font-weight: 650;
   757→    letter-spacing: 0.015em;
   758→  }`;
   759→  }
   760→
   761→  if (preset === "glass") {
   762→    return `
   763→  .subgraph {
   764→    filter: drop-shadow(0 8px 18px color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 10%, transparent));
   765→  }
   766→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   767→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 10%, var(--bg));
   768→    fill-opacity: 0.62;
   769→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 30%, var(--bg)) !important;
   770→    stroke-width: 1.15 !important;
   771→  }
   772→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   773→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 24%, var(--bg));
   774→    fill-opacity: 0.78;
   775→    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 36%, var(--bg)) !important;
   776→    stroke-width: 1.15 !important;
   777→  }
   778→  .subgraph > text {
   779→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 82%, var(--bg)) !important;
   780→    font-weight: 620;
   781→  }`;
   782→  }
   783→
   784→  return `
   785→  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
   786→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 2.5%, var(--bg));
   787→  }
   788→  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
   789→    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 9%, var(--bg));
   790→  }
   791→  .subgraph > text {
   792→    font-weight: 600;
   793→  }`;
   794→}
   795→
   796→function parsePoints(pointsAttr: string): Point[] {
   797→  return pointsAttr
   798→    .trim()
   799→    .split(/\s+/)
   800→    .map((pair) => {
   801→      const [xPart, yPart] = pair.split(",");
   802→      const x = Number.parseFloat(xPart ?? "");
   803→      const y = Number.parseFloat(yPart ?? "");
   804→      return Number.isFinite(x) && Number.isFinite(y) ? { x, y } : null;
   805→    })
   806→    .filter((point): point is Point => point !== null);
   807→}
   808→
   809→function distance(a: Point, b: Point): number {
   810→  const dx = b.x - a.x;
   811→  const dy = b.y - a.y;
   812→  return Math.hypot(dx, dy);
   813→}
   814→
   815→function toFixedPoint(point: Point): string {
   816→  return `${point.x.toFixed(2)} ${point.y.toFixed(2)}`;
   817→}
   818→
   819→function roundedPolylinePath(points: Point[], radius = 12): string {
   820→  if (points.length === 0) {
   821→    return "";
   822→  }
   823→
   824→  if (points.length <= 2) {
   825→    return `M ${points.map(toFixedPoint).join(" L ")}`;
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  let path = `M ${toFixedPoint(points[0]!)}`;
   829→
   830→  for (let index = 1; index < points.length - 1; index += 1) {
   831→    const prev = points[index - 1]!;
   832→    const current = points[index]!;
   833→    const next = points[index + 1]!;
   834→
   835→    const prevLength = distance(prev, current);
   836→    const nextLength = distance(current, next);
   837→    if (prevLength < 0.001 || nextLength < 0.001) {
   838→      path += ` L ${toFixedPoint(current)}`;
   839→      continue;
   840→    }
   841→
   842→    const inRadius = Math.min(radius, prevLength / 2);
   843→    const outRadius = Math.min(radius, nextLength / 2);
   844→
   845→    const inPoint: Point = {
   846→      x: current.x - ((current.x - prev.x) / prevLength) * inRadius,
   847→      y: current.y - ((current.y - prev.y) / prevLength) * inRadius,
   848→    };
   849→    const outPoint: Point = {
   850→      x: current.x + ((next.x - current.x) / nextLength) * outRadius,
   851→      y: current.y + ((next.y - current.y) / nextLength) * outRadius,
   852→    };
   853→
   854→    path += ` L ${toFixedPoint(inPoint)} Q ${toFixedPoint(current)} ${toFixedPoint(outPoint)}`;
   855→  }
   856→
   857→  path += ` L ${toFixedPoint(points[points.length - 1]!)} `;
   858→  return path.trim();
   859→}
   860→
   861→function copyAttributes(from: Element, to: Element, skip: string[] = []): void {
   862→  for (const attribute of Array.from(from.attributes)) {
   863→    if (skip.includes(attribute.name)) {
   864→      continue;
   865→    }
   866→
   867→    to.setAttribute(attribute.name, attribute.value);
   868→  }
   869→}
   870→
   871→function topRoundedRectPath(
   872→  x: number,
   873→  y: number,
   874→  width: number,
   875→  height: number,
   876→  radius: number,
   877→): string {
   878→  const r = Math.max(0, Math.min(radius, width / 2, height));
   879→  if (r <= 0) {
   880→    return `M ${x} ${y} H ${x + width} V ${y + height} H ${x} Z`;
   881→  }
   882→
   883→  return [
   884→    `M ${x + r} ${y}`,
   885→    `H ${x + width - r}`,
   886→    `Q ${x + width} ${y} ${x + width} ${y + r}`,
   887→    `V ${y + height}`,
   888→    `H ${x}`,
   889→    `V ${y + r}`,
   890→    `Q ${x} ${y} ${x + r} ${y}`,
   891→    "Z",
   892→  ].join(" ");
   893→}
   894→
   895→function convertPolylineElement(doc: XMLDocument, polyline: SVGPolylineElement): void {
   896→  const points = parsePoints(polyline.getAttribute("points") ?? "");
   897→  if (points.length < 2) {
   898→    return;
   899→  }
   900→
   901→  const path = doc.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
   902→  copyAttributes(polyline, path, ["points"]);
   903→
   904→  const d = roundedPolylinePath(points, 12);
   905→  if (!d) {
   906→    return;
   907→  }
   908→
   909→  path.setAttribute("d", d);
   910→  if (!path.hasAttribute("fill")) {
   911→    path.setAttribute("fill", "none");
   912→  }
   913→  polyline.replaceWith(path);
   914→}
   915→
   916→function applyLineGeometry(doc: XMLDocument, mode: BeautifulRenderConfig["lineGeometry"]): void {
   917→  if (mode === "default" || mode === "orthogonal") {
   918→    return;
   919→  }
   920→
   921→  const polylines = doc.querySelectorAll<SVGPolylineElement>(
   922→    "polyline.edge, polyline.class-relationship, polyline.er-relationship, g.message > polyline",
   923→  );
   924→
   925→  for (const polyline of Array.from(polylines)) {
   926→    convertPolylineElement(doc, polyline);
   927→  }
   928→}
   929→
   930→function applyCornerStyle(
   931→  doc: XMLDocument,
   932→  cornerStyle: BeautifulRenderConfig["cornerStyle"],
   933→): void {
   934→  if (cornerStyle === "default") {
   935→    return;
   936→  }
   937→
   938→  const set = CORNER_RADIUS_SET[cornerStyle];
   939→  const scale = 1;
   940→
   941→  const applyRadius = (selector: string, baseRadius: number): void => {
   942→    const rects = doc.querySelectorAll<SVGRectElement>(selector);
   943→    for (const rect of Array.from(rects)) {
   944→      const height = Number.parseFloat(rect.getAttribute("height") ?? "");
   945→      const radius =
   946→        baseRadius < 0 && Number.isFinite(height)
   947→          ? Math.max(8, Math.floor((height / 2) * scale))
   948→          : Math.max(0, Math.round(baseRadius * scale));
   949→
   950→      rect.setAttribute("rx", String(radius));
   951→      rect.setAttribute("ry", String(radius));
   952→    }
   953→  };
   954→
   955→  const applyTopOnlyRadius = (selector: string, baseRadius: number, className: string): void => {
   956→    const rects = doc.querySelectorAll<SVGRectElement>(selector);
   957→    for (const rect of Array.from(rects)) {
   958→      const x = Number.parseFloat(rect.getAttribute("x") ?? "");
   959→      const y = Number.parseFloat(rect.getAttribute("y") ?? "");
   960→      const width = Number.parseFloat(rect.getAttribute("width") ?? "");
   961→      const height = Number.parseFloat(rect.getAttribute("height") ?? "");
   962→
   963→      if (
   964→        ![x, y, width, height].every((value) => Number.isFinite(value)) ||
   965→        width <= 0 ||
   966→        height <= 0
   967→      ) {
   968→        continue;
   969→      }
   970→
   971→      const rawRadius =
   972→        baseRadius < 0
   973→          ? Math.max(8, Math.floor((height / 2) * scale))
   974→          : Math.max(0, Math.round(baseRadius * scale));
   975→      const radius = Math.max(0, Math.min(rawRadius, Math.floor(width / 2), Math.floor(height)));
   976→
   977→      if (radius <= 0) {
   978→        rect.setAttribute("rx", "0");
   979→        rect.setAttribute("ry", "0");
   980→        continue;
   981→      }
   982→
   983→      const path = doc.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "path");
   984→      copyAttributes(rect, path, ["x", "y", "width", "height", "rx", "ry"]);
   985→      const existingClassName = path.getAttribute("class");
   986→      path.setAttribute(
   987→        "class",
   988→        existingClassName ? `${existingClassName} ${className}` : className,
   989→      );
   990→      path.setAttribute("d", topRoundedRectPath(x, y, width, height, radius));
   991→      if (!path.hasAttribute("fill")) {
   992→        path.setAttribute("fill", "none");
   993→      }
   994→      rect.replaceWith(path);
   995→    }
   996→  };
   997→
   998→  applyRadius(".node > rect", set.node);
   999→  applyRadius(".class-node > rect", set.classNode);
  1000→  applyRadius(".entity > rect", set.entity);
  1001→  applyRadius(".subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1)", set.subgraphOuter);
  1002→  applyTopOnlyRadius(
  1003→    ".subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(2)",
  1004→    set.subgraphHeader,
  1005→    "subgraph-header-shape",
  1006→  );
  1007→  applyTopOnlyRadius(".entity > rect:nth-of-type(2)", set.entity, "entity-header-shape");
  1008→  applyTopOnlyRadius(".class-node > rect:nth-of-type(2)", set.classNode, "class-header-shape");
  1009→  applyRadius(".actor > rect", set.actor);
  1010→  applyRadius(".activation", set.activation);
  1011→}
  1012→
  1013→function applyEdgeLabelStyle(doc: XMLDocument, config: BeautifulRenderConfig): void {
  1014→  if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "default") {
  1015→    return;
  1016→  }
  1017→
  1018→  const groups = doc.querySelectorAll<SVGGElement>("g.edge-label");
  1019→  for (const group of Array.from(groups)) {
  1020→    const textNodes = group.querySelectorAll<SVGTextElement>("text");
  1021→    for (const textNode of Array.from(textNodes)) {
  1022→      textNode.setAttribute("font-size", String(EDGE_LABEL_FONT_SIZE));
  1023→      textNode.setAttribute("stroke", "none");
  1024→      textNode.setAttribute("paint-order", "normal");
  1025→      textNode.setAttribute("stroke-width", "0");
  1026→      textNode.setAttribute("fill", "var(--_text-muted)");
  1027→    }
  1028→
  1029→    const backgroundRect = group.querySelector<SVGRectElement>("rect");
  1030→    if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "minimal") {
  1031→      for (const textNode of Array.from(textNodes)) {
  1032→        textNode.setAttribute("fill", "var(--_text)");
  1033→        textNode.setAttribute("stroke", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--bg) 86%, transparent)");
  1034→        textNode.setAttribute("stroke-width", "2.4");
  1035→        textNode.setAttribute("stroke-linejoin", "round");
  1036→        textNode.setAttribute("paint-order", "stroke fill");
  1037→      }
  1038→      backgroundRect?.remove();
  1039→      continue;
  1040→    }
  1041→
  1042→    if (!backgroundRect) {
  1043→      continue;
  1044→    }
  1045→
  1046→    if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "subtle") {
  1047→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("rx", "5");
  1048→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("ry", "5");
  1049→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("fill", "var(--bg)");
  1050→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 14%, var(--bg))");
  1051→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke-width", "1");
  1052→      continue;
  1053→    }
  1054→
  1055→    if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "pill") {
  1056→      const height = Number.parseFloat(backgroundRect.getAttribute("height") ?? "");
  1057→      const radius = Number.isFinite(height) ? Math.max(8, Math.round(height / 2)) : 999;
  1058→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("rx", String(radius));
  1059→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("ry", String(radius));
  1060→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("fill", "var(--bg)");
  1061→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 14%, var(--bg))");
  1062→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke-width", "1");
  1063→      continue;
  1064→    }
  1065→
  1066→    if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "contrast") {
  1067→      for (const textNode of Array.from(textNodes)) {
  1068→        textNode.setAttribute("fill", "var(--bg)");
  1069→      }
  1070→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("rx", "4");
  1071→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("ry", "4");
  1072→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("fill", "var(--fg)");
  1073→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke", "none");
  1074→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke-width", "0");
  1075→      continue;
  1076→    }
  1077→
  1078→    if (config.edgeLabelStyle === "accent") {
  1079→      for (const textNode of Array.from(textNodes)) {
  1080→        textNode.setAttribute("fill", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 72%, var(--fg))");
  1081→      }
  1082→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("rx", "6");
  1083→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("ry", "6");
  1084→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("fill", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 14%, var(--bg))");
  1085→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke", "color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent) 45%, var(--bg))");
  1086→      backgroundRect.setAttribute("stroke-width", "1");
  1087→    }
  1088→  }
  1089→}
  1090→
  1091→function buildElementCssVariableBlock(declarations: string[]): string {
  1092→  if (declarations.length === 0) {
  1093→    return "";
  1094→  }
  1095→
  1096→  return `
  1097→  svg {
  1098→    ${declarations.join("\n    ")}
  1099→  }
  1100→`;
  1101→}
  1102→
  1103→function buildVisualCss(config: BeautifulRenderConfig, cssVariableDeclarations: string[]): string {
  1104→  const edgeWidthMultiplier =
  1105→    config.edgeWeight === "default" ? null : EDGE_WIDTH_MULTIPLIER[config.edgeWeight];
  1106→  const borderWidthMultiplier =
  1107→    config.borderWeight === "default" ? null : BORDER_WIDTH_MULTIPLIER[config.borderWeight];
  1108→  const cssVariableBlock = buildElementCssVariableBlock(cssVariableDeclarations);
  1109→  const monoFontFamily = toCssSingleQuotedFont(resolveMonoFont(config));
  1110→
  1111→  const edgeWidthCss = edgeWidthMultiplier
  1112→    ? `stroke-width: ${(1 * edgeWidthMultiplier).toFixed(2)}px !important;`
  1113→    : "";
  1114→  const thickEdgeWidthCss = edgeWidthMultiplier
  1115→    ? `stroke-width: ${(2 * edgeWidthMultiplier).toFixed(2)}px !important;`
  1116→    : "";
  1117→  const lifelineWidthCss = edgeWidthMultiplier
  1118→    ? `stroke-width: ${Math.max(0.7, 0.75 * edgeWidthMultiplier).toFixed(2)}px !important;`
  1119→    : "";
  1120→
  1121→  const borderWidthCss = borderWidthMultiplier
  1122→    ? `stroke-width: ${borderWidthMultiplier.toFixed(2)}px !important;`
  1123→    : "";
  1124→  const borderLineWidthCss = borderWidthMultiplier
  1125→    ? `stroke-width: ${Math.max(0.8, borderWidthMultiplier * 0.75).toFixed(2)}px !important;`
  1126→    : "";
  1127→
  1128→  const edgeDash =
  1129→    config.edgePattern === "default"
  1130→      ? ""
  1131→      : `stroke-dasharray: ${EDGE_DASH[config.edgePattern]} !important;`;
  1132→  const borderDash =
  1133→    config.borderPattern === "default"
  1134→      ? ""
  1135→      : `stroke-dasharray: ${BORDER_DASH[config.borderPattern]} !important;`;
  1136→
  1137→  return `${cssVariableBlock}
  1138→
  1139→  .mono {
  1140→    font-family: ${monoFontFamily}, 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', ui-monospace, monospace !important;
  1141→  }
  1142→
  1143→  .edge,
  1144→  .class-relationship,
  1145→  .er-relationship,
  1146→  .message > line,
  1147→  .message > polyline,
  1148→  .message > path {
  1149→    stroke: var(--_line) !important;
  1150→    ${edgeWidthCss}
  1151→    ${edgeDash}
  1152→    stroke-linecap: round;
  1153→    stroke-linejoin: round;
  1154→  }
  1155→
  1156→  .lifeline {
  1157→    stroke: var(--_line) !important;
  1158→    ${lifelineWidthCss}
  1159→    ${edgeDash}
  1160→  }
  1161→
  1162→  .edge[data-style='thick'] {
  1163→    ${thickEdgeWidthCss}
  1164→  }
  1165→
  1166→  .node > rect,
  1167→  .node > ellipse,
  1168→  .node > polygon,
  1169→  .node > path,
  1170→  .class-node > rect,
  1171→  .class-node > .class-header-shape,
  1172→  .entity > rect,
  1173→  .entity > .entity-header-shape,
  1174→  .actor > rect,
  1175→  .activation,
  1176→  .subgraph > .subgraph-header-shape,
  1177→  .subgraph > rect {
  1178→    stroke: var(--_node-stroke) !important;
  1179→    ${borderWidthCss}
  1180→    ${borderDash}
  1181→  }
  1182→
  1183→  .node > line,
  1184→  .class-node > line,
  1185→  .entity > line {
  1186→    stroke: var(--_inner-stroke) !important;
  1187→    ${borderLineWidthCss}
  1188→    ${borderDash}
  1189→  }
  1190→
  1191→  ${subgraphPresetRules(config.subgraphStyle)}`;
  1192→}
  1193→
  1194→function applyVisualOverrides(
  1195→  svg: string,
  1196→  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
  1197→  cssVariableDeclarations: string[],
  1198→): string {
  1199→  const parser = new DOMParser();
  1200→  const document = parser.parseFromString(svg, "image/svg+xml");
  1201→  if (document.querySelector("parsererror")) {
  1202→    return svg;
  1203→  }
  1204→
  1205→  const root = document.documentElement;
  1206→  if (!root || root.tagName.toLowerCase() !== "svg") {
  1207→    return svg;
  1208→  }
  1209→
  1210→  applyLineGeometry(document, config.lineGeometry);
  1211→  applyCornerStyle(document, config.cornerStyle);
  1212→  applyEdgeLabelStyle(document, config);
  1213→
  1214→  const existingStyle = root.querySelector("style[data-playground-visual-overrides]");
  1215→  existingStyle?.remove();
  1216→
  1217→  const styleElement = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "style");
  1218→  styleElement.setAttribute("data-playground-visual-overrides", "");
  1219→  styleElement.textContent = buildVisualCss(config, cssVariableDeclarations);
  1220→  root.append(styleElement);
  1221→
  1222→  return new XMLSerializer().serializeToString(document);
  1223→}
  1224→
  1225→export function useBeautifulRenderer(
  1226→  code: Ref<string>,
  1227→  config: Ref<BeautifulRenderConfig>,
  1228→  delayMs = 300,
  1229→) {
  1230→  const renderState = ref<RenderState>({
  1231→    svg: null,
  1232→    ascii: null,
  1233→    asciiHtml: null,
  1234→    error: null,
  1235→    durationMs: null,
  1236→    renderId: 0,
  1237→  });
  1238→
  1239→  const isRendering = ref(false);
  1240→  let latestRenderToken = 0;
  1241→  let latestScheduleToken = 0;
  1242→
  1243→  async function renderNow(): Promise<void> {
  1244→    const renderToken = latestRenderToken + 1;
  1245→    latestRenderToken = renderToken;
  1246→
  1247→    const startedAt = performance.now();
  1248→    const originalSource = stripCommonLeadingIndent(code.value.trim());
  1249→    const source = stripCommonLeadingIndent(
  1250→      forceDirection(originalSource, config.value.directionOverride),
  1251→    );
  1252→
  1253→    if (!source) {
  1254→      if (renderToken !== latestRenderToken) {
  1255→        return;
  1256→      }
  1257→
  1258→      renderState.value = {
  1259→        svg: null,
  1260→        ascii: null,
  1261→        asciiHtml: null,
  1262→        error: null,
  1263→        durationMs: Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt),
  1264→        renderId: renderToken,
  1265→      };
  1266→      return;
  1267→    }
  1268→
  1269→    const previousSvg = renderState.value.svg;
  1270→    const previousAscii = renderState.value.ascii;
  1271→    const previousAsciiHtml = renderState.value.asciiHtml;
  1272→
  1273→    try {
  1274→      isRendering.value = true;
  1275→      const runtime = await loadBeautifulMermaid();
  1276→      if (renderToken !== latestRenderToken) {
  1277→        return;
  1278→      }
  1279→
  1280→      const baseTokens = resolveThemeTokenValues(config.value);
  1281→      const tokenOverrides = resolveMermaidOptionTokenOverrides(config.value, baseTokens);
  1282→      const effectiveTokens = applyOptionTokenOverrides(baseTokens, tokenOverrides);
  1283→      const scopedOverrides = resolveElementScopedOverrides(config.value, effectiveTokens);
  1284→      const renderOptions = buildBeautifulMermaidOptions(config.value, effectiveTokens);
  1285→
  1286→      if (config.value.outputMode === "svg") {
  1287→        const result = renderSvgWithFallback(runtime, source, originalSource, renderOptions);
  1288→        const rawSvg = result.svg;
  1289→        const styledSvg = applyVisualOverrides(
  1290→          rawSvg,
  1291→          config.value,
  1292→          scopedOverrides.svgDeclarations,
  1293→        );
  1294→
  1295→        if (result.usedFallback) {
  1296→          // Keep this visible in devtools without interrupting successful output.
  1297→          console.warn("[playground] layout fallback applied after ELK scanline hitbox failure");
  1298→        }
  1299→
  1300→        renderState.value = {
  1301→          svg: styledSvg,
  1302→          ascii: previousAscii,
  1303→          asciiHtml: previousAsciiHtml,
  1304→          error: null,
  1305→          durationMs: Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt),
  1306→          renderId: renderToken,
  1307→        };
  1308→      } else {
  1309→        const asciiTheme = applyTextThemeOverrides(
  1310→          buildAsciiThemeFromTokens(effectiveTokens),
  1311→          scopedOverrides.textOverrides,
  1312→        );
  1313→        const ascii = stripCommonLeadingIndent(
  1314→          runtime.renderMermaidASCII(
  1315→            source,
  1316→            buildAsciiRenderOptions(config.value, asciiTheme, false),
  1317→          ),
  1318→        );
  1319→        const asciiHtml = runtime.renderMermaidASCII(
  1320→          source,
  1321→          buildAsciiRenderOptions(config.value, asciiTheme, true),
  1322→        );
  1323→
  1324→        renderState.value = {
  1325→          svg: previousSvg,
  1326→          ascii,
  1327→          asciiHtml,
  1328→          error: null,
  1329→          durationMs: Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt),
  1330→          renderId: renderToken,
  1331→        };
  1332→      }
  1333→    } catch (error: unknown) {
  1334→      if (renderToken !== latestRenderToken) {
  1335→        return;
  1336→      }
  1337→
  1338→      const errorMessage = isRendererLoadError(error)
  1339→        ? `Failed to load renderer runtime: ${getErrorMessage(error)}`
  1340→        : getErrorMessage(error);
  1341→      renderState.value = {
  1342→        svg: previousSvg,
  1343→        ascii: previousAscii,
  1344→        asciiHtml: previousAsciiHtml,
  1345→        error: errorMessage,
  1346→        durationMs: Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt),
  1347→        renderId: renderToken,
  1348→      };
  1349→    } finally {
  1350→      if (renderToken === latestRenderToken) {
  1351→        isRendering.value = false;
  1352→      }
  1353→    }
  1354→  }
  1355→
  1356→  const scheduleDebouncedRender = useDebounceFn((scheduleToken: number) => {
  1357→    if (scheduleToken !== latestScheduleToken) {
  1358→      return;
  1359→    }
  1360→
  1361→    void renderNow();
  1362→  }, delayMs);
  1363→
  1364→  function cancelScheduledRender(): void {
  1365→    latestScheduleToken += 1;
  1366→  }
  1367→
  1368→  function scheduleRender(): void {
  1369→    const scheduleToken = latestScheduleToken + 1;
  1370→    latestScheduleToken = scheduleToken;
  1371→    void scheduleDebouncedRender(scheduleToken);
  1372→  }
  1373→
  1374→  onUnmounted(() => {
  1375→    cancelScheduledRender();
  1376→    latestRenderToken += 1;
  1377→    isRendering.value = false;
  1378→  });
  1379→
  1380→  return {
  1381→    isRendering: computed(() => isRendering.value),
  1382→    renderState,
  1383→    renderNow,
  1384→    scheduleRender,
  1385→    cancelScheduledRender,
  1386→  };
  1387→}
  1388→
```

```text
     1→# Beautiful Mermaid Playground
     2→
     3→A minimal live playground for Mermaid diagrams, built with Vue 3.6 + Vite 8.
     4→
     5→## Run
     6→
     7→```bash
     8→pnpm install
     9→pnpm dev
    10→```
    11→
    12→## Scripts
    13→
    14→```bash
    15→pnpm lint
    16→pnpm type-check
    17→pnpm build
    18→pnpm preview
    19→```
    20→
    21→## Build notes
    22→
    23→- Theme tokens are generated before `dev`, `type-check`, and `build` via
    24→  `scripts/generate-beautiful-themes.ts`.
    25→- Vite chunk warnings are tuned to `1500kB` because Monaco and diagram runtime
    26→  are intentionally split into dedicated async chunks.
    27→
    28→## Acknowledgements
    29→
    30→- [Mermaid](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid)
    31→- [beautiful-mermaid](https://github.com/lukilabs/beautiful-mermaid)
    32→
```
</details></tool-use>

    49→};

    51→type IdleCallback = (deadline: { didTimeout: boolean; timeRemaining: () => number }) => void;
    52→type IdleRequestOptions = { timeout?: number };
    53→type WindowWithIdleCallback = Window & {
    54→  requestIdleCallback?: (callback: IdleCallback, options?: IdleRequestOptions) => number;
    55→  cancelIdleCallback?: (handle: number) => void;
    56→};

    67→
    68→function formatSampleOptionTitle(title: string): string {
    69→  const trimmed = title.trim();
    70→  const withoutPrefix = trimmed.includes(":")
    71→    ? trimmed.split(":").slice(1).join(":").trim()
    72→    : trimmed;
    73→  const base = withoutPrefix || trimmed;
    74→
    75→  return base.replace(/\b([A-Z][a-z]+)\b/g, (word, _capture, offset) =>
    76→    offset === 0 ? word : word.toLowerCase(),
    77→  );
    78→}
    79→

    89→
    90→function hexToRgb(hex: string): { r: number; g: number; b: number } | null {
    91→  const normalized = hex.trim().replace("#", "");
    92→  if (!/^[\da-f]{3,8}$/i.test(normalized)) {
    93→    return null;
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  if (normalized.length === 3) {
    97→    const [r, g, b] = normalized.split("");
    98→    if (!r || !g || !b) {
    99→      return null;
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    return {
   103→      r: Number.parseInt(r + r, 16),
   104→      g: Number.parseInt(g + g, 16),
   105→      b: Number.parseInt(b + b, 16),
   106→    };
   107→  }
   108→
   109→  if (normalized.length === 6 || normalized.length === 8) {
   110→    return {
   111→      r: Number.parseInt(normalized.slice(0, 2), 16),
   112→      g: Number.parseInt(normalized.slice(2, 4), 16),
   113→      b: Number.parseInt(normalized.slice(4, 6), 16),
   114→    };
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  return null;
   118→}
   119→
   120→function isDarkHex(hex: string): boolean {
   121→  const rgb = hexToRgb(hex);
   122→  if (!rgb) {
   123→    return false;
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  const luminance = (0.2126 * rgb.r + 0.7152 * rgb.g + 0.0722 * rgb.b) / 255;
   127→  return luminance < 0.53;
   128→}

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./opensrc/repos/github.com/Justineo/beautiful-mermaid-playground/scripts/generate-beautiful-themes.ts`

```text
     1→import { mkdir, readFile, writeFile } from "node:fs/promises";
     2→import path from "node:path";
     3→
     4→const ROOT = process.cwd();
     5→const OUTPUT_PATH = path.join(ROOT, "src/generated/beautifulThemes.ts");
     6→const OUTPUT_DIR = path.dirname(OUTPUT_PATH);
     7→
     8→function toPrettyJson(value) {
     9→  return JSON.stringify(value, null, 2);
    10→}
    11→
    12→async function writeIfChanged(filePath, content) {
    13→  let previous = null;
    14→  try {
    15→    previous = await readFile(filePath, "utf8");
    16→  } catch {
    17→    previous = null;
    18→  }
    19→
    20→  if (previous === content) {
    21→    return false;
    22→  }
    23→
    24→  await mkdir(path.dirname(filePath), { recursive: true });
    25→  await writeFile(filePath, content, "utf8");
    26→  return true;
    27→}
    28→
    29→function normalizeThemes(themes) {
    30→  return Object.fromEntries(
    31→    Object.entries(themes)
    32→      .sort(([left], [right]) => left.localeCompare(right))
    33→      .map(([name, tokens]) => [name, tokens]),
    34→  );
    35→}
    36→
    37→async function main() {
    38→  const runtime = await import("beautiful-mermaid");
    39→
    40→  const defaults = runtime.DEFAULTS;
    41→  const themes = runtime.THEMES;
    42→
    43→  if (!defaults || typeof defaults !== "object") {
    44→    throw new Error("Failed to read DEFAULTS from beautiful-mermaid");
    45→  }
    46→
    47→  if (!themes || typeof themes !== "object") {
    48→    throw new Error("Failed to read THEMES from beautiful-mermaid");
    49→  }
    50→
    51→  const normalizedThemes = normalizeThemes(themes);
    52→  const fileContent = `// Generated by scripts/generate-beautiful-themes.ts. Do not edit manually.\n\nexport const DEFAULT_THEME_TOKENS = ${toPrettyJson(defaults)} as const\n\nexport const BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS = ${toPrettyJson(normalizedThemes)} as const\n\nexport type DiagramThemeName = keyof typeof BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS\n`;
    53→
    54→  await mkdir(OUTPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
    55→  const written = await writeIfChanged(OUTPUT_PATH, fileContent);
    56→  const verb = written ? "Generated" : "Up-to-date";
    57→  console.log(`${verb} ${path.relative(ROOT, OUTPUT_PATH)}`);
    58→}
    59→
    60→main().catch((error) => {
    61→  console.error(error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error));
    62→  process.exitCode = 1;
    63→});
    64→
```
</details></tool-use>

Excellent! Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile a final summary report:

## Beautiful Mermaid Playground - Comprehensive Analysis

I've thoroughly explored the beautiful-mermaid-playground repository. Here's what makes their mermaid styling "beautiful":

### 1. **Project Structure**

```
src/
├── components/           # Vue 3 UI components (MermaidPreview, MermaidEditor, etc.)
├── composables/          # Vue composition functions
│   ├── useBeautifulRenderer.ts  # Main rendering logic
│   ├── usePlaygroundState.ts    # State management
│   └── useOverlayScrollbars.ts  # Scrollbar styling
├── generated/            # Auto-generated theme files
│   ├── beautifulThemes.ts       # Official Mermaid themes
│   └── unofficialThemes.ts      # Community themes
├── styles/
│   └── global.css        # Global styling with CSS variables
├── types/playground.ts   # TypeScript configuration types
├── utils/
│   ├── diagramTheme.ts   # Theme resolution logic
│   └── googleFonts.ts    # Font loading utilities
└── constants/monacoThemes.ts # Editor themes
```

### 2. **Theme System Architecture**

**Two-tier theme system:**

1. **Beautiful-Mermaid Built-in Themes** (15+ official themes)
   - catppuccin-latte, catppuccin-mocha
   - dracula, github-light, github-dark
   - nord, nord-light
   - one-dark
   - solarized-light, solarized-dark
   - tokyo-night, tokyo-night-light, tokyo-night-storm
   - zinc-light, zinc-dark

2. **Unofficial Community Themes** (ayu-light/dark, everforest, etc.)

**Theme tokens per color:**
```typescript
{
  bg: string;        // Background color
  fg: string;        // Foreground/text color
  line?: string;     // Connector/line color
  accent?: string;   // Arrow heads, highlights
  muted?: string;    // Secondary text
  surface?: string;  // Node fill backgrounds
  border?: string;   // Node/subgraph stroke
}
```

### 3. **CSS Styling & Color Mixing Strategy**

**Color blending with `color-mix()`:**
The playground uses CSS `color-mix(in srgb, ...)` to intelligently derive missing colors from base foreground/background pairs:

```typescript
// If color not explicitly defined:
line = color-mix(in srgb, fg 50%, bg)      // 50/50 blend
accent = color-mix(in srgb, fg 85%, bg)    // High contrast
muted = color-mix(in srgb, fg 40%, bg)     // Reduced contrast
surface = color-mix(in srgb, fg 3%, bg)    // Subtle tint
border = color-mix(in srgb, fg 20%, bg)    // Medium contrast
```

### 4. **Mermaid Rendering Configuration**

**Beautiful-mermaid RenderOptions:**
```typescript
{
  bg: string;              // Background
  fg: string;              // Foreground
  line: string;            // Lines/edges
  accent: string;          // Emphasis
  muted: string;           // Secondary elements
  surface: string;         // Node fill
  border: string;          // Node stroke
  font: string;            // Base font family
  transparent: boolean;    // Transparency support
  padding: number;         // Overall padding
  nodeSpacing: number;     // Space between nodes
  layerSpacing: number;    // Space between layers
  componentSpacing: number;// Space between components
}
```

### 5. **Visual Styling Presets (10+ Styles)**

**Subgraph Styles:**
- `minimal` - Transparent background, minimal borders
- `soft` - Subtle fills with transparency
- `outlined` - Dashed borders, minimal fill
- `elevated` - Drop shadow effect
- `accent` - Accent-colored with glow
- `brutalist` - Heavy borders, stark contrast
- `neon` - Bright accent with glow effect
- `signal` - Line-based styling
- `contrast` - High-contrast text on filled backgrounds
- `glass` - Glassmorphism with backdrop blur effect

**Edge/Line Geometry:**
- `default` - Orthogonal (right angles)
- `orthogonal` - Native orthogonal routing
- `rounded` - Curved connections with custom SVG path generation

**Corner Styles:**
- `sharp` - 0px radius
- `soft` - 5-7px radius
- `rounded` - 10-14px radius
- `pill` - 16-22px radius (pill-shaped)

**Edge Label Styles:**
- `default` - No background
- `minimal` - White stroke outline only
- `subtle` - Rounded background
- `pill` - Full pill-shaped background
- `contrast` - High-contrast background
- `accent` - Accent-colored background

**Weight Control:**
- Edge weight multipliers: `normal (1x)`, `bold (1.5x)`, `heavy (2x)`
- Border weight multipliers: `normal (1x)`, `bold (1.35x)`, `heavy (1.8x)`

**Stroke Patterns:**
- Solid, dashed (`8 5` dash array), dotted (`2.25 4.25` dash array)

### 6. **SVG Post-Processing Pipeline**

The renderer applies visual overrides via SVG DOM manipulation:

1. **CSS Variable Injection** - Injects element-scoped color overrides:
   ```css
   svg {
     --_text: color;
     --_arrow: arrowHeadColor;
     --_node-stroke: borderColor;
     /* etc. */
   }
   ```

2. **Geometry Transformations:**
   - Polyline → rounded SVG paths (with configurable radius)
   - Rect corner radius application
   - Top-only rounded corners for headers

3. **Style Rules Applied:**
   - Edge weight/dash patterns
   - Node/border stroke adjustments
   - Subgraph preset styling
   - Edge label background customization

### 7. **Font System**

**Supported Base Fonts:**
- Inter, Geist, IBM Plex Sans, Roboto, Google Sans, Lato, JetBrains Mono

**Supported Mono Fonts:**
- JetBrains Mono, Geist Mono, IBM Plex Mono, Roboto Mono, Google Sans Code

**Dynamic Font Loading:**
- Maps font names to Google Fonts URLs
- Custom font family support

### 8. **Global CSS Design System**

```css
:root {
  --t-bg: #ffffff;              /* Theme background */
  --t-fg: #27272a;              /* Theme foreground */
  --t-accent: #3b82f6;          /* Theme accent */
  
  /* Derived colors using color-mix */
  --surface: var(--t-bg);
  --surface-muted: color-mix(in srgb, var(--t-fg) 2%, var(--t-bg));
  --surface-elevated: color-mix(in srgb, var(--t-fg) 5%, var(--t-bg));
  --text-primary: var(--t-fg);
  --text-secondary: color-mix(in srgb, var(--t-fg) 74%, var(--t-bg));
  --text-muted: color-mix(in srgb, var(--t-fg) 52%, var(--t-bg));
  --border-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--t-fg) 15%, var(--t-bg));
  
  /* UI control dimensions */
  --ui-control-height: 23px;
  --ui-control-radius: 5px;
  
  /* Typography scale */
  --fs-title: 0.9375rem;
  --fs-section: 0.8125rem;
  --fs-control: 0.75rem;
}
```

### 9. **Key Features Making it "Beautiful"**

1. **Theme-aware rendering** - 15+ built-in themes from popular color schemes
2. **Smart color derivation** - Intelligently creates missing colors via CSS color-mix
3. **Extensive customization** - Every visual aspect is configurable
4. **Multiple rendering modes** - SVG, ASCII (unicode, ANSI), with theme consistency
5. **Layout fallback system** - Graceful degradation when ELK layout fails
6. **Real-time preview** - Debounced rendering with performance optimization
7. **Export capabilities** - SVG/PNG download and copy-to-clipboard
8. **Accessibility focus** - Proper color contrast, semantic HTML, keyboard navigation
9. **Typography sophistication** - Multiple font families with consistent scaling
10. **Visual style presets** - 10+ predefined aesthetic patterns for subgraphs

### 10. **Default Configuration** (from usePlaygroundState)

```typescript
// Defaults that prioritize aesthetics
{
  outputMode: "svg",
  diagramTheme: "github-light",
  subgraphStyle: "soft",        // Soft subgraphs by default
  lineGeometry: "default",      // Orthogonal lines
  cornerStyle: "default",       // Keep Mermaid defaults
  edgeLabelStyle: "subtle",     // Subtle label backgrounds
  edgePattern: "default",       // Solid edges
  edgeWeight: "default",        // Standard width
  borderPattern: "default",     // Solid borders
  borderWeight: "default",      // Standard width
  transparent: true,            // Transparent background
  padding: 40,                  // Generous spacing
  nodeSpacing: 24,              // Comfortable node separation
  layerSpacing: 48,             // Spacious layers
  componentSpacing: 32,         // Component breathing room
}
```

### Files to Review:
- `/src/composables/useBeautifulRenderer.ts` - 1388 lines, the core rendering engine
- `/src/utils/diagramTheme.ts` - Theme resolution logic
- `/src/types/playground.ts` - All configuration type definitions
- `/src/generated/beautifulThemes.ts` - Auto-generated official themes
- `/src/generated/unofficialThemes.ts` - Community themes
- `/src/styles/global.css` - Global design tokens
- `/src/composables/usePlaygroundState.ts` - Default settings

**Path prefix:** `<REPO_ROOT>/opensrc/repos/github.com/Justineo/beautiful-mermaid-playground/`

 `./packages/rich-renderer-mermaid/src/useMermaidRender.ts`

```text
     1→import type { ColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     3→import { useEffect, useId, useState } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { darkTheme, lightTheme } from './mermaid-theme'
     6→
     7→export function useMermaidRender(
     8→  content: string,
     9→  preferredColorScheme?: ColorScheme,
    10→) {
    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
    12→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    13→  const [svg, setSvg] = useState('')
    14→  const [width, setWidth] = useState<number>()
    15→  const [height, setHeight] = useState<number>()
    16→
    17→  const colorScheme = useColorScheme()
    18→  const effectiveColorScheme = preferredColorScheme ?? colorScheme
    19→  const id = useId().split(':').join('')
    20→
    21→  useEffect(() => {
    22→    if (!content) return
    23→    setError('')
    24→    setLoading(true)
    25→
    26→    let cancelled = false
    27→
    28→    import('mermaid').then(async (mo) => {
    29→      const mermaid = mo.default
    30→      const themeConfig =
    31→        effectiveColorScheme === 'dark' ? darkTheme : lightTheme
    32→
    33→      mermaid.initialize({
    34→        startOnLoad: false,
    35→        theme: themeConfig.theme,
    36→        themeVariables: themeConfig.themeVariables,
    37→        darkMode: effectiveColorScheme === 'dark',
    38→        flowchart: {
    39→          htmlLabels: true,
    40→          curve: 'basis',
    41→          padding: 16,
    42→        },
    43→        sequence: {
    44→          actorMargin: 80,
    45→          messageMargin: 40,
    46→        },
    47→        gantt: {
    48→          titleTopMargin: 16,
    49→          barHeight: 24,
    50→          barGap: 6,
    51→        },
    52→      })
    53→
    54→      let result
    55→      try {
    56→        result = await mermaid.render(`mermaid-${id}`, content)
    57→      } catch (err) {
    58→        document.getElementById(`dmermaid-${id}`)?.remove()
    59→        if (err instanceof Error) {
    60→          setError(err.message)
    61→        }
    62→        setSvg('')
    63→        setWidth(undefined)
    64→        setHeight(undefined)
    65→      }
    66→
    67→      if (cancelled) return
    68→
    69→      if (result) {
    70→        setSvg(result.svg)
    71→        const match = result.svg.match(/viewBox="[^"]*\s([\d.]+)\s([\d.]+)"/)
    72→        if (match?.[1] && match?.[2]) {
    73→          setWidth(Number.parseInt(match[1]))
    74→          setHeight(Number.parseInt(match[2]))
    75→        }
    76→        setError('')
    77→      }
    78→      setLoading(false)
    79→    })
    80→
    81→    return () => {
    82→      cancelled = true
    83→    }
    84→  }, [id, content, effectiveColorScheme])
    85→
    86→  let imgSrc = ''
    87→  if (svg) {
    88→    const encoder = new TextEncoder()
    89→    const data = encoder.encode(svg)
    90→    imgSrc = `data:image/svg+xml;base64,${btoa(String.fromCodePoint(...new Uint8Array(data)))}`
    91→  }
    92→
    93→  return { loading, error, imgSrc, svg, width, height }
    94→}
    95→
```
</details></tool-use>

import { computed, onUnmounted, ref } from "vue";

function getErrorMessage(error: unknown): string {
  if (error instanceof Error) {
    return error.message;
  }

  return String(error);
}

function isRendererLoadError(error: unknown): boolean {
  const message = getErrorMessage(error).toLowerCase();
  return (
    message.includes("failed to fetch dynamically imported module") ||
    message.includes("error loading dynamically imported module") ||
    message.includes("loading chunk") ||
    message.includes("chunkloaderror")
  );
}

type MermaidOptionTokenValues = {

  border?: string;
};

type SvgRenderResult = {

  usedFallback: boolean;
};

let beautifulMermaidRuntimePromise: Promise<BeautifulMermaidRuntime> | null = null;

function loadBeautifulMermaid(): Promise<BeautifulMermaidRuntime> {
  if (!beautifulMermaidRuntimePromise) {
    beautifulMermaidRuntimePromise = import("beautiful-mermaid");
  }

  return beautifulMermaidRuntimePromise;
}

export async function preloadRenderer(): Promise<void> {
  await loadBeautifulMermaid();
}

function mixFrom(base: ThemeChannels, percent: number): string {
  return `color-mix(in srgb, ${base.fg} ${percent}%, ${base.bg})`;

function normalizeThemeChannels(base: ThemeChannels): ThemeChannels {
  return {
    ...base,
    line: base.line ?? mixFrom(base, 50),
    accent: base.accent ?? mixFrom(base, 85),
    muted: base.muted ?? mixFrom(base, 40),
    surface: base.surface ?? mixFrom(base, 3),
    border: base.border ?? mixFrom(base, 20),
  };
}

```text
import { BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS, DEFAULT_THEME_TOKENS } from "@/generated/beautifulThemes";
import { UNOFFICIAL_THEME_TOKENS } from "@/generated/unofficialThemes";
import type { DiagramTheme } from "@/types/playground";

export type ThemeChannels = {
  bg: string;
  fg: string;
  line?: string;
  accent?: string;
  muted?: string;
  surface?: string;
  border?: string;
};

type BuiltInDiagramTheme = keyof typeof BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS;
type UnofficialDiagramTheme = keyof typeof UNOFFICIAL_THEME_TOKENS;

function isBuiltInDiagramTheme(theme: DiagramTheme): theme is BuiltInDiagramTheme {
  return theme in BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS;
}

function isUnofficialDiagramTheme(theme: DiagramTheme): theme is UnofficialDiagramTheme {
  return theme in UNOFFICIAL_THEME_TOKENS;
}

export function resolveDiagramThemeTokens(theme: DiagramTheme): ThemeChannels {
  if (isBuiltInDiagramTheme(theme)) {
    return BEAUTIFUL_THEME_TOKENS[theme];
  }

  if (isUnofficialDiagramTheme(theme)) {
    return UNOFFICIAL_THEME_TOKENS[theme];
  }

  return DEFAULT_THEME_TOKENS;
}
```
</details></tool-use>

  if (firstMeaningfulIndex < 0) {
    return source;
  }

  const header = lines[firstMeaningfulIndex] ?? "";
  const flowHeader = header.match(/^\s*(graph|flowchart)\s+(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\b/i);
  if (flowHeader) {
    lines[firstMeaningfulIndex] = header.replace(/\b(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\b/i, directionOverride);
    return lines.join("\n");
  }

  const stateHeader = header.match(/^\s*stateDiagram(?:-v2)?\s*$/i);
  if (stateHeader) {
    const directionLineRegex = /^\s*direction\s+(TD|TB|LR|RL|BT)\s*$/i;
    for (let index = firstMeaningfulIndex + 1; index < lines.length; index += 1) {
      const line = lines[index];
      if (!line) {
        continue;
      }

      if (directionLineRegex.test(line.trim())) {
        lines[index] = `  direction ${directionOverride}`;
        return lines.join("\n");
      }
    }

    lines.splice(firstMeaningfulIndex + 1, 0, `  direction ${directionOverride}`);
    return lines.join("\n");
  }

  return source;
}

function toThemeTokenValues(theme: ThemeChannels): ThemeTokenValues {
  return {
    bg: theme.bg,
    fg: theme.fg,
    line: theme.line ?? mixFrom(theme, 50),
    accent: theme.accent ?? mixFrom(theme, 85),
    muted: theme.muted ?? mixFrom(theme, 40),
    surface: theme.surface ?? mixFrom(theme, 3),
    border: theme.border ?? mixFrom(theme, 20),
  };
}

function resolveThemeTokenValues(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): ThemeTokenValues {
  const baseTheme = resolveDiagramThemeTokens(config.diagramTheme);
  const normalizedBaseTheme = normalizeThemeChannels({
    ...baseTheme,
    bg: config.useCustomBg ? config.customBg : baseTheme.bg,
    fg: config.useCustomFg ? config.customFg : baseTheme.fg,
  });

  const resolved = toThemeTokenValues(normalizedBaseTheme);
  return {
    ...resolved,
    line: config.useCustomLine ? config.customLine : resolved.line,
    accent: config.useCustomAccent ? config.customAccent : resolved.accent,
    muted: config.useCustomMuted ? config.customMuted : resolved.muted,
    surface: config.useCustomSurface ? config.customSurface : resolved.surface,
    border: config.useCustomBorder ? config.customBorder : resolved.border,
  };
}

function resolveElementCustomColor(
  role: ElementColorRole,
  rule: ElementColorRule,
  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
): string {
  if (rule.source === "none") {
    return "transparent";
  }

  if (rule.source === "custom") {
    return rule.custom;
  }

  if (rule.source === "token") {
    return tokens[rule.token];
  }

  if (role === "text") {
    return tokens.fg;
  }

  if (role === "arrowHeads") {
    return tokens.accent;
  }

  if (role === "secondaryText") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 60);
  }

  if (role === "edgeLabels") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 40);
  }

  if (role === "faintText") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 25);
  }

  if (role === "connectors") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 50);
  }

  if (role === "nodeFill") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 3);
  }

  if (role === "groupHeader") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 5);
  }

  if (role === "innerStrokes") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 12);
  }

  if (role === "nodeStroke") {
    return mixFrom(tokens, 20);
  }

  return tokens.fg;
}

function isMermaidOptionTokenValue(token: ThemeToken): token is keyof MermaidOptionTokenValues {
  return (
    token === "line" ||
    token === "accent" ||
    token === "muted" ||
    token === "surface" ||
    token === "border"
  );
}

function resolveMermaidOptionTokenOverrides(
  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
): MermaidOptionTokenValues {
  const overrides: MermaidOptionTokenValues = {};

  if (config.useCustomLine) {
    overrides.line = config.customLine;
  }
  if (config.useCustomAccent) {
    overrides.accent = config.customAccent;
  }
  if (config.useCustomMuted) {
    overrides.muted = config.customMuted;
  }
  if (config.useCustomSurface) {
    overrides.surface = config.customSurface;
  }
  if (config.useCustomBorder) {
    overrides.border = config.customBorder;
  }

  for (const roleMeta of ELEMENT_COLOR_ROLES) {
    const bridge = roleMeta.tokenBridge;
    if (!bridge || roleMeta.scope === "text" || !isMermaidOptionTokenValue(bridge)) {
      continue;
    }

    const rule = config.elementColors[roleMeta.role];
    if (rule.source === "default") {
      continue;
    }

    overrides[bridge] = resolveElementCustomColor(roleMeta.role, rule, tokens);
  }

  return overrides;
}

function applyOptionTokenOverrides(
  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
  overrides: MermaidOptionTokenValues,
): ThemeTokenValues {
  return {
    ...tokens,
    line: overrides.line ?? tokens.line,
    accent: overrides.accent ?? tokens.accent,
    muted: overrides.muted ?? tokens.muted,
    surface: overrides.surface ?? tokens.surface,
    border: overrides.border ?? tokens.border,
  };
}

function buildAsciiThemeFromTokens(tokens: ThemeTokenValues): AsciiThemeValues {
  return {
    fg: tokens.fg,
    border: tokens.border,
    line: tokens.line,
    arrow: tokens.accent,
    accent: tokens.accent,
    bg: tokens.bg,
    corner: tokens.line,
    junction: tokens.border,
  };
}

function resolveElementScopedOverrides(
  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
  tokens: ThemeTokenValues,
): {
  svgDeclarations: string[];
  textOverrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues>;
} {
  const svgDeclarations: string[] = [];
  const textOverrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues> = {};

  for (const roleMeta of ELEMENT_COLOR_ROLES) {
    const rule = config.elementColors[roleMeta.role];
    if (rule.source === "default") {
      continue;
    }

    const color = resolveElementCustomColor(roleMeta.role, rule, tokens);
    if (roleMeta.scope !== "text") {
      const cssVar = ELEMENT_ROLE_CSS_VAR[roleMeta.role];
      if (cssVar) {
        svgDeclarations.push(`${cssVar}: ${color};`);
      }
    }

    if (roleMeta.scope !== "svg") {
      const field = ELEMENT_ROLE_TEXT_THEME_FIELD[roleMeta.role];
      if (field) {
        textOverrides[field] = color;
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    svgDeclarations,
    textOverrides,
  };
}

function applyTextThemeOverrides(
  baseTheme: AsciiThemeValues,
  overrides: Partial<AsciiThemeValues>,
): AsciiThemeValues {
  const nextTheme: AsciiThemeValues = {
    ...baseTheme,
    ...overrides,
  };

  nextTheme.accent = nextTheme.arrow;
  nextTheme.corner = nextTheme.line;
  nextTheme.junction = nextTheme.border;

  return nextTheme;
}

function buildAsciiRenderOptions(
  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
  theme: AsciiThemeValues,
  previewMode: boolean,
): AsciiRenderOptions {
  return {
    useAscii: config.outputMode === "ascii",
    colorMode: previewMode ? "html" : config.textColorMode,
    paddingX: config.textPaddingX,
    paddingY: config.textPaddingY,
    boxBorderPadding: config.textBoxBorderPadding,
    theme,
  };
}

function stripCommonLeadingIndent(source: string): string {
  const lines = source.split("\n");
  let minIndent = Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;

  for (const line of lines) {
    if (line.trim().length === 0) {
      continue;
    }

    const indent = line.match(/^ */u)?.[0].length ?? 0;
    minIndent = Math.min(minIndent, indent);
  }

  if (!Number.isFinite(minIndent) || minIndent <= 0) {
    return source;
  }

  return lines.map((line) => line.slice(minIndent)).join("\n");
}

function resolveBaseFont(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): string {
  if (config.baseFont !== "Custom") {
    return config.baseFont;
  }

  const customFamily = config.customBaseFontFamily.trim();
  return customFamily.length > 0 ? customFamily : "Inter";
}

function resolveMonoFont(config: BeautifulRenderConfig): string {
  if (config.monoFont !== "Custom") {
    return config.monoFont;

  const customFamily = config.customMonoFontFamily.trim();

}

function toCssSingleQuotedFont(fontFamily: string): string {
  return `'${fontFamily.replace(/\\/gu, "\\\\").replace(/'/gu, "\\'")}'`;
}

export function buildBeautifulMermaidOptions(
  config: BeautifulRenderConfig,
  tokens?: ThemeTokenValues,
): RenderOptions {
  const effectiveTokens = (() => {
    if (tokens) {
      return tokens;
    }

    const resolvedTokens = resolveThemeTokenValues(config);
    const tokenOverrides = resolveMermaidOptionTokenOverrides(config, resolvedTokens);
    return applyOptionTokenOverrides(resolvedTokens, tokenOverrides);
  })();

  return {
    bg: effectiveTokens.bg,
    fg: effectiveTokens.fg,
    line: effectiveTokens.line,
    accent: effectiveTokens.accent,
    muted: effectiveTokens.muted,
    surface: effectiveTokens.surface,
    border: effectiveTokens.border,
    font: resolveBaseFont(config),
    transparent: config.transparent,
    padding: config.padding,
    nodeSpacing: config.nodeSpacing,
    layerSpacing: config.layerSpacing,
    componentSpacing: config.componentSpacing,
  };
}

function isRetryableLayoutError(error: unknown): boolean {
  const message = getErrorMessage(error);
  return /scanline constraint|invalid hitboxes/i.test(message);
}

function buildSafeLayoutOptions(base: RenderOptions): RenderOptions {
  return {
    ...base,
    padding: Math.max(base.padding ?? 0, 36),
    nodeSpacing: Math.max(base.nodeSpacing ?? 0, 24),
    layerSpacing: Math.max(base.layerSpacing ?? 0, 48),
    componentSpacing: Math.max(base.componentSpacing ?? 0, 32),
  };
}

function renderSvgWithFallback(
  runtime: BeautifulMermaidRuntime,
  source: string,
  originalSource: string,
  renderOptions: RenderOptions,
): SvgRenderResult {
  try {
    return {
      svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(source, renderOptions),
      usedFallback: false,
    };
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    if (!isRetryableLayoutError(error)) {
      throw error;
    }
  }

  const safeOptions = buildSafeLayoutOptions(renderOptions);

  try {
    return {
      svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(source, safeOptions),
      usedFallback: true,
    };
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    if (!isRetryableLayoutError(error) || source === originalSource) {
      throw error;
    }
  }

  return {
    svg: runtime.renderMermaidSVG(originalSource, safeOptions),
    usedFallback: true,
  };
}

function subgraphPresetRules(preset: BeautifulRenderConfig["subgraphStyle"]): string {
  if (preset === "default") {
    return "";
  }

  if (preset === "minimal") {
    return `
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: transparent;
    stroke-width: 1 !important;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: transparent;
    stroke-width: 0 !important;
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    font-weight: 560;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "soft") {
    return `
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 2.5%, var(--bg));
    fill-opacity: 0.96;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 9%, var(--bg));
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    font-weight: 600;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "outlined") {
    return `
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: transparent;
    stroke-dasharray: 6 3 !important;
    stroke-width: 1.05 !important;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 6%, var(--bg));
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    letter-spacing: 0.01em;
    font-weight: 580;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "elevated") {
    return `
  .subgraph {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 7px 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 12%, transparent));
  }
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 4%, var(--bg));
    fill-opacity: 0.98;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 12%, var(--bg));
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    font-weight: 620;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "accent") {
    return `
  .subgraph {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 40%, transparent));
  }
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 14%, var(--bg)) !important;
    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 72%, var(--bg)) !important;
    stroke-width: 1.25 !important;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 22%, var(--bg)) !important;
    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 82%, var(--bg)) !important;
    stroke-width: 1.25 !important;
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    fill: var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) !important;
    font-weight: 650;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "brutalist") {
    return `
  .subgraph {
    filter: drop-shadow(4px 4px 0 color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 76%, var(--bg)));
  }
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: var(--bg);
    stroke: var(--fg) !important;
    stroke-width: 2.2 !important;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: var(--fg);
    stroke: var(--fg) !important;
    stroke-width: 2.2 !important;
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    fill: var(--bg) !important;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  }`;
  }

  if (preset === "neon") {
    return `
  .subgraph {
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 16px color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 55%, transparent));
  }
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 8%, var(--bg));
    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 95%, var(--bg)) !important;
    stroke-width: 1.4 !important;
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 22%, var(--bg));
    stroke: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 98%, var(--bg)) !important;

  .subgraph > text {

  }

  if (preset === "signal") {

  }
  .subgraph > text {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent, var(--_arrow)) 96%, var(--bg)) !important;

  if (preset === "contrast") {

  .subgraph > text {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 82%, var(--bg)) !important;
    font-weight: 620;

  return `
  .subgraph > rect:nth-of-type(1) {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 2.5%, var(--bg));
  }
  ${SUBGRAPH_HEADER_SELECTOR} {
    fill: color-mix(in srgb, var(--fg) 9%, var(--bg));
  }
  .subgraph > text {
    font-weight: 600;
  }`;
}

    .map((pair) => {

      const x = Number.parseFloat(xPart ?? "");
      const y = Number.parseFloat(yPart ?? "");
      return Number.isFinite(x) && Number.isFinite(y) ? { x, y } : null;
    })
